_note: Switching device ontology — electrical ratings + symbol mapping (DXF block name) + compatible load types. Generator selects switch type from inputs.controls_protocol + load count.

dimmer.description: Rotary or push dimmer (trailing edge for LED)

presence._citation: BS EN 60669-2-2 (electronic detection switches) + BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §714 (occupancy controls)

daylight_sensor._citation: BS EN 15193-1:2017 + Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) §6.2 daylight-linking

presence_with_dimming.description: Combined presence detector + daylight sensor + dimming output
presence_with_dimming._citation: BS EN 60669-2-2 + BS EN 15193-1:2017 + Approved Doc L §6.2

dali_master.description: DALI master switch / wall controller (entry-point control for a DALI line)
dali_master._citation: IEC 62386-101 + BS EN 62386-102 (DALI bus + control device)

dali_application_controller.description: DALI application controller (panel-mount; orchestrates scenes/zones across multiple lines)
